itemListElement.description: What to do when an agent goes wrong — detect, contain, investigate, remediate.

itemListElement.description: Role-based access control matrix for multi-agent systems.

itemListElement.name: Data Retention Policy Template
itemListElement.description: Data retention schedules, auto-purge triggers, and deletion workflows for agents.

itemListElement.name: Agent Audit Log Specification
itemListElement.description: What to log, format, retention, and review cadence for agent audit trails.

itemListElement.name: The Agent Starter Pack
itemListElement.description: Four foundational guides — alignment, SOUL.md, security, memory. Perfect for beginners.

itemListElement.name: The Developer's Essential Kit
itemListElement.description: Everything a developer needs — Operator Kit, SDLC Pipeline, Guardrails, Commands. Save $207.

itemListElement.description: Complete security toolkit — audit templates, SOC2 mapping, access controls, ethics review.

itemListElement.name: The Entrepreneur's Launch Kit
itemListElement.description: Validate your AI product — lean canvas, pricing research, A/B testing, ethics review.

itemListElement.name: The Multi-Agent Architect's Collection
itemListElement.description: Definitive collection for multi-agent architects — authority, hierarchy, SOPs, AGENTS.md. Save $218.

itemListElement.name: Agent Alignment Checker
itemListElement.description: Score any agent output against the 7 Hive Doctrine alignment principles. Returns score 0-100 with per-principle breakdown.

itemListElement.name: System Prompt Scorer
itemListElement.description: Evaluate system prompts on 5 dimensions — clarity, safety, effectiveness, specificity, robustness. Returns grade A-F.

itemListElement.name: Context Window Analyser
itemListElement.description: Analyse token distribution, identify waste, and get an optimised version of your prompt/context.

itemListElement.name: Agent Name Generator
itemListElement.description: Generate 5 culturally-rooted agent names with backstories and SOUL.md snippets.

itemListElement.name: README-to-AGENTS.md Converter
itemListElement.description: Convert any project README into a complete AGENTS.md file with agent definitions, coordination patterns, and anti-patterns.

itemListElement.name: Context Lookup (RAG)
itemListElement.description: Semantic search across 270+ agent knowledge products. Returns relevant context blocks with metadata and relevance scores.

itemListElement.name: Agent Configuration Audit
itemListElement.description: Comprehensive agent configuration audit across 10 dimensions — security, alignment, capability, operational readiness. Returns scored report with actionable recommendations.

itemListElement.name: Threat Model Generator
itemListElement.description: Generate a STRIDE-based threat model from a system description. Returns attack vectors, severity ratings, and mitigations.

itemListElement.name: Agent Architect
itemListElement.description: Design a complete multi-agent architecture from requirements. Returns agent roles, tools, memory, coordination patterns, and infrastructure.

itemListElement.name: SOUL.md Generator
itemListElement.description: Generate a complete SOUL.md constitution file from name, role, and traits. Culturally-rooted with personality depth.

itemListElement.name: Multi-Agent Planner
itemListElement.description: Decompose a complex task into a multi-agent execution plan with agent roles, handoffs, and coordination protocols.

itemListElement.name: Security Scan
itemListElement.description: Scan system prompts for security vulnerabilities — injection vectors, data leakage, privilege escalation, output manipulation.

itemListElement.name: Cost Estimator
itemListElement.description: Estimate monthly operating costs for an agent configuration. Covers LLM API, infrastructure, storage, and monitoring.

itemListElement.name: Memory Designer
itemListElement.description: Design optimal memory architecture for agents — context window strategy, persistence, retrieval, and compression.

itemListElement.name: Tool Auditor
itemListElement.description: Audit MCP tool definitions or function calling schemas for quality, security, and coverage gaps.

itemListElement.name: Compliance Check
itemListElement.description: Check agent configurations against EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF, ISO 42001, GDPR, and SOC 2 frameworks.

itemListElement.name: Deploy Planner
itemListElement.description: Generate a deployment plan for agent systems — Docker, serverless, edge, or hybrid with cost estimates.

itemListElement.name: Fact Check
itemListElement.description: AI-generated factual plausibility assessment. Returns hedged verdict, confidence score, and caveats. Not a substitute for authoritative fact-checking.

itemListElement.name: Hallucination Check
itemListElement.description: AI-generated comparison of output against source material to flag potential hallucinations. Sonnet-powered analysis.

itemListElement.name: Schema Validator
itemListElement.description: AI-generated schema analysis for MCP tools, OpenAPI specs, JSON schemas, and agent cards. Flags potential issues.

itemListElement.name: Anti-Scam Check
itemListElement.description: Heuristic risk analysis of x402 endpoints and MCP servers. Pattern-based red flag detection only.

itemListElement.name: Context Optimizer
itemListElement.description: AI-generated suggestions for LLM inference parameters based on task type and model.

itemListElement.name: Jurisdiction Check
itemListElement.description: Automated regulatory landscape scan — identifies potentially applicable regulations for review. NOT legal advice.

itemListElement.name: Kill Switch
itemListElement.description: Automated budget/safety analysis for proposed agent actions. Preliminary signal only — NOT an authorization.

itemListElement.name: API-to-MCP Converter
itemListElement.description: AI-generated MCP tool definitions and server scaffold from REST API specs. Review before use.

itemListElement.name: Vibe Audit
itemListElement.description: AI-generated brand voice consistency analysis across content samples. Subjective assessment.

itemListElement.name: Prompt Optimizer
itemListElement.description: AI-generated prompt optimization suggestions for cost, quality, or speed. Test before adopting.

itemListElement.name: Terms Analyzer
itemListElement.description: Automated preliminary scan of Terms of Service for AI agent relevance. NOT legal advice.

itemListElement.name: Intent Router
itemListElement.description: AI-generated service routing suggestions based on natural language queries.
